title: Beehiiv vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Omnisend email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and which suits newsletters vs e-commerce best.
h1: Beehiiv vs Omnisend: Detailed Comparison for Email Marketing
intro: Beehiiv and Omnisend are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter creators and publishers seeking monetization opportunities, while Omnisend targets e-commerce businesses needing integrated email and SMS campaigns. Choosing between them depends on your primary business model and marketing channels.
choose_a_if: You're a newsletter publisher looking to monetize through ads and sponsorships
You need a generous free tier with up to 2,500 subscribers
You want built-in analytics and a web reader for your audience
choose_b_if: You're an e-commerce business needing combined email and SMS campaigns
You require omnichannel automation with push notifications
You want to start affordably at $16/month with advanced segmentation

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Beehiiv excels for newsletter creators with monetization options, while Omnisend is superior for e-commerce businesses needing multi-channel marketing. Omnisend offers better value for most use cases with lower pricing and more comprehensive features.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Omnisend?
faq.a: Omnisend is cheaper at $16/month for paid plans versus Beehiiv's $39/month. However, Beehiiv offers a more generous free tier with 2,500 subscribers compared to Omnisend's 250, making it better for budget-conscious early-stage publishers.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically support email list exports, allowing you to migrate your subscribers. However, note that Beehiiv focuses on newsletters while Omnisend includes SMS, so you may lose SMS functionality in the switch. It's best to plan your migration carefully based on your feature requirements.
